summary.lv: eLizings.lv SIA meklē Chief Technology Officer (CTO), kas vadīs uzņēmuma tehnoloģiju virzību Rīgā klātienē, ar atalgojumu 7000-10000 EUR bruto mēnesī.
summary.en: eLizings.lv SIA is hiring a Chief Technology Officer (CTO) based on-site in Riga to lead the company's technology direction, with a gross monthly salary of EUR 7000–10000.
